name: pharaoh
description:
AI production pipeline for audio dramas. Generate dialogue with Qwen3-TTS or Chatterbox voice cloning, sound effects, music via ACE-Step, and run RVC voice conversion — all from Claude. Connects to local or remote Pharaoh inference servers.

Requires: uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) and at least one running Pharaoh inference server.

projects_dir.title: Projects Directory
projects_dir.description: Folder where your Pharaoh audio drama projects are stored. Will be created if it doesn't exist.

inference_host.title: Inference Server Host
inference_host.description: Hostname or IP of the machine running the Pharaoh inference servers. Use 127.0.0.1 for local inference, or your server's IP/hostname for a remote GPU box. Individual server ports (18001–18006) are fixed.
